value_chain_position: Cloud-native endpoint and identity security platform — sells Falcon platform modules (EDR/XDR, identity, cloud security, threat intel) on a single AI-driven agent; the security layer every cloud and AI deployment requires.
relative_comps: CRWD is the highest-growth large-cap security name: 23% YoY on $5.1B TTM revenue with a 29% FCF margin on the path to 35%+. Its Falcon platform has the highest customer NRR in the sector and the 2024 outage, while damaging to brand, did not materially arrest growth. Versus PANW, CRWD is smaller, faster-growing, and trades at a meaningful premium (~32x revenue). Versus S (SentinelOne), CRWD is 4x the revenue with superior margins. The AI adjacency is real — Charlotte AI feeds on the same agent telemetry, making CRWD a compound beneficiary of AI workload proliferation.
